name: health_disparities_get_svi_info
description: Get information about CDC Social Vulnerability Index (SVI) data. SVI data is typically available as downloadable CSV files from the CDC ATSDR website. This tool provides information about available SVI datasets and download links. Note: Actual data retrieval may require downloading CSV files.

year.description: Optional year to filter SVI data (e.g., 2020, 2018, 2016). SVI is released every 2 years.

geography.description: Geographic level: 'county' for county-level, 'tract' for census tract, 'state' for state-level

download_url.description: URL to download the SVI dataset

note.description: Information about data format and access

name: health_disparities_get_county_rankings_info
description: Get information about County Health Rankings data. County Health Rankings provides county-level health data for US counties including health outcomes, factors, and rankings. Returns available years, state filters, and access URLs for downloading CSV/Excel datasets.

year.description: Optional year for County Health Rankings data (e.g., 2023, 2022, 2021).

state.description: Optional state abbreviation (e.g., 'CA', 'NY', 'TX') to filter by state.

access_url.description: URL to access County Health Rankings data
